# ==============================================================================
# THREADBARE WAVER PLUGIN
# Generated by shared/scripts/scaffold-plugin.js
# ==============================================================================

set(WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Source)
set(WAVER_DSP_DIR ${WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT}/DSP)
set(WAVER_PROCESSORS_DIR ${WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT}/Processors)
set(WAVER_UI_DIR ${WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT}/UI)
set(WAVER_CONFIG_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/config)

option(THREADBARE_COPY_PLUGIN_AFTER_BUILD "Copy plugin to system folders after build" ON)

# ==============================================================================
# PARAMETER GENERATION (params.json -> C++ header + JS module)
# ==============================================================================
set(PARAMS_JSON ${WAVER_CONFIG_DIR}/params.json)
set(PARAMS_CPP_OUTPUT ${WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT}/WaverGeneratedParams.h)
set(PARAMS_JS_OUTPUT ${WAVER_UI_DIR}/frontend/src/generated/params.js)
set(PARAMS_GENERATOR ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/shared/scripts/generate_params.js)

find_program(NODE_EXECUTABLE node HINTS /usr/local/bin /opt/homebrew/bin)
if(NOT NODE_EXECUTABLE)
    message(WARNING "Node.js not found - parameter generation will be skipped")
else()
    add_custom_command(
        OUTPUT ${PARAMS_CPP_OUTPUT} ${PARAMS_JS_OUTPUT}
        COMMAND ${NODE_EXECUTABLE} ${PARAMS_GENERATOR} ${PARAMS_JSON} ${PARAMS_CPP_OUTPUT} ${PARAMS_JS_OUTPUT}
        DEPENDS ${PARAMS_JSON} ${PARAMS_GENERATOR}
        COMMENT "Generating parameter definitions from params.json"
        VERBATIM
    )

    add_custom_target(WaverGenerateParams
        DEPENDS ${PARAMS_CPP_OUTPUT} ${PARAMS_JS_OUTPUT}
    )
endif()

# ==============================================================================
# DSP LIBRARY
# ==============================================================================
file(GLOB_RECURSE WAVER_DSP_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "${WAVER_DSP_DIR}/*.cpp")
file(GLOB_RECURSE WAVER_PROCESSOR_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "${WAVER_PROCESSORS_DIR}/*.cpp")
file(GLOB_RECURSE WAVER_UI_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "${WAVER_UI_DIR}/*.cpp")

if(WAVER_DSP_SOURCES STREQUAL "")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "No DSP sources found in ${WAVER_DSP_DIR}.")
endif()

add_library(waver_dsp STATIC ${WAVER_DSP_SOURCES})
target_include_directories(waver_dsp PUBLIC ${WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT})
target_compile_features(waver_dsp PUBLIC cxx_std_20)
target_link_libraries(waver_dsp PUBLIC juce::juce_dsp)

# ==============================================================================
# FRONTEND RESOURCES
# ==============================================================================
file(GLOB_RECURSE UI_RESOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "${WAVER_UI_DIR}/frontend/dist/*")
juce_add_binary_data(WaverResources
    NAMESPACE WaverResources
    SOURCES ${UI_RESOURCES}
)

set_source_files_properties(${UI_RESOURCES} PROPERTIES
    HEADER_FILE_ONLY FALSE
)

# ==============================================================================
# PLUGIN TARGET
# ==============================================================================
juce_add_plugin(ThreadbareWaver
    COMPANY_NAME "threadbare"
    IS_SYNTH TRUE
    NEEDS_MIDI_INPUT TRUE
    NEEDS_MIDI_OUTPUT FALSE
    IS_MIDI_EFFECT FALSE
    EDITOR_WANTS_KEYBOARD_FOCUS FALSE
    COPY_PLUGIN_AFTER_BUILD ${THREADBARE_COPY_PLUGIN_AFTER_BUILD}
    VST3_CAN_REPLACE_VST2 FALSE
    PLUGIN_MANUFACTURER_CODE TrbR
    PLUGIN_CODE Wavr
    FORMATS VST3 AU Standalone
    PRODUCT_NAME "waver"
    ICON_BIG "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/assets/app-icon.png"
    ICON_SMALL "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/assets/app-icon.png"
)

juce_generate_juce_header(ThreadbareWaver)

target_sources(ThreadbareWaver PRIVATE
    ${WAVER_PROCESSOR_SOURCES}
    ${WAVER_UI_SOURCES}
    ${PARAMS_CPP_OUTPUT}
)
target_include_directories(ThreadbareWaver PRIVATE ${WAVER_SOURCE_ROOT})
target_compile_features(ThreadbareWaver PUBLIC cxx_std_20)

if(TARGET WaverGenerateParams)
    add_dependencies(ThreadbareWaver WaverGenerateParams)
endif()

target_link_libraries(ThreadbareWaver
    PRIVATE
        waver_dsp
        WaverResources
        threadbare_core
        juce::juce_audio_utils
        juce::juce_gui_extra
        juce::juce_recommended_warning_flags
        juce::juce_recommended_config_flags
        juce::juce_recommended_lto_flags
)

target_compile_definitions(ThreadbareWaver
    PRIVATE
        JUCE_VST3_CAN_REPLACE_VST2=0
)

if(DEFINED THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT)
    string(REPLACE "\"" "" THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT_CLEAN "${THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT}")
    if(TARGET ThreadbareWaver_VST3)
        get_target_property(PLUGIN_VST3_PATH ThreadbareWaver_VST3 JUCE_PLUGIN_ARTEFACT_FILE)
    else()
        set(PLUGIN_VST3_PATH "")
    endif()
    if(TARGET ThreadbareWaver_AU)
        get_target_property(PLUGIN_AU_PATH ThreadbareWaver_AU JUCE_PLUGIN_ARTEFACT_FILE)
    else()
        set(PLUGIN_AU_PATH "")
    endif()
    string(REPLACE "\\" "\\\\" PLUGIN_VST3_PATH_ESC "${PLUGIN_VST3_PATH}")
    string(REPLACE "\\" "\\\\" PLUGIN_AU_PATH_ESC "${PLUGIN_AU_PATH}")
    file(WRITE "${THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT_CLEAN}" "{\n")
    file(APPEND "${THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT_CLEAN}" "  \"vst3\": \"${PLUGIN_VST3_PATH_ESC}\",\n")
    file(APPEND "${THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT_CLEAN}" "  \"au\": \"${PLUGIN_AU_PATH_ESC}\"\n")
    file(APPEND "${THREADBARE_ARTEFACTS_OUT_CLEAN}" "}\n")
endif()
